kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Between Highrow and Kingsford, one goes with Rowan and the other with 16 coins.
12 coins goes with exactly one of Beatrix, Bridgegate, or Oldwall.
The artisan in Bridgegate's levy is lower than both Edmund and the artisan in Oldwall.
Bridgegate, Eastcheap, and Southgate go with 6 coins, 10 coins, and 18 coins, in some order.
If Aldric does not go with Bridgegate, then Bridgegate goes with 14 coins.
The artisan in Highrow's levy is exactly 6 coins more than Cedric.
The artisan in Bridgegate's levy is higher than both Wulfric and the artisan in Riverside.
Edmund goes with at least one of Oldwall, Southgate, or 8 coins.
At most one of (the members of the Hill Ward and Edmund) goes with (12 coins or 16 coins).

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Between Foxglen and Grayreach, one goes with Royce and the other with 12 lb.
8 lb goes with exactly one of Cody, Birchpool, or Pinehollow.
The angler at Birchpool's weight is lower than both Esther and the angler at Pinehollow.
Birchpool, Cedarmere, and Willowmere go with 2 lb, 6 lb, and 14 lb, in some order.
If Boone does not go with Birchpool, then Birchpool goes with 10 lb.
The angler at Foxglen's weight is exactly 6 lb more than Dale.
The angler at Birchpool's weight is higher than both Wade and the angler at Stillwater.
Esther goes with at least one of Pinehollow, Willowmere, or 4 lb.
